name: Holdermus (Elderberry Mush)
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove the elderberries from their stems and briefly cook in a skillet with very little water.
2. Prepare either a roux or a smooth mixture of milk mixed with a small amount of flour.
3. Add the prepared mixture to the skillet and stir constantly until it reaches a good boil.
4. Stir in a spoonful of honey.
5. If using the milk/flour mixture, pour hot clarified butter over the top.
6. Optionally, scatter pan-toasted bread cubes on top before serving directly from the copper skillet.
Serves 4.
